subject: Steps semantic HD direction checkpoint
rights_scope: Research and test evidence only; no formal game release is authorized by this record.
human_statement: 这次高清化是比较成功的，继续吧
approved_scope: Replace final-framebuffer topology projection with source-semantic content reconstruction.
Preserve the square source composition while modernizing continuous contours, materials, internal detail, and fixed-font text.
Proceed from representative direction review to same-state gameplay, motion, and cue review.
candidate_artifact_outcome: The direction credit remains valid, but deeper representative preflight rejected v19c because its HD content route bypassed a source visibility effect. Successor v19d is a separate machine-qualified candidate pending human review.
